ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "type_of_program" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., Conference, Workshop, Seminar) */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "organizing_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organizing institution */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the program */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the program (e.g., National, International) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_website" TEXT /* URL of the program's official website */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the program (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_organizing_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizing_institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program where the paper was presented */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the paper (comma-separated) */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the paper */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the paper has been cited */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the paper record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the paper record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_papers_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program where the participant is involved */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., Presenter, Organizer, Attendee) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Department or affiliation within the institution */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the institution record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Faculty, Researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
